text:
TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 5 

SOURCE: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) National Death Index (NDI) 

VALUES: 00100 = Certain infectious and parasitic 
diseases (A00–B99, U071) 

00200 = Intestinal infectious diseases 
(A00–A09) 

00300 = Cholera (A00) 

00400 = Other intestinal infectious 
diseases (A01–A08) 

00500 = Typhoid fever (A01.0) 

00600 = Paratyphoid fevers and other 
salmonella infections (A01.1–
A01.4, A02) 

00700 = Shigellosis (A03) 

00800 = Other bacterial
